metadata.title: SynGO no. 1e SypI + VAMP2_PMID:12181340
metadata.comment:
These notes are for SynGO Noctua model. 
Rat SypI full-length cDNA (921 base pairs) cloned into the pBlueScript vector (Stratagene, La Jolla, CA) was provided by Dr. R. Leube (University of Mainz, Mainz, Germany).
VAMP2 full-length cDNA (351 base pairs) cloned into pBlueScript was from Drs. C. Montecucco and O. Rossetto (University of Padua, Italy).
Synaptotagmin I (SytI) full-length cDNA (1265 base pairs) was supplied by Dr. G. Schiavo (Imperial Cancer Research Fund, London, United Kingdom).
--> I emailed authors to enquire about VAMP2 and Syt1 species. The authors confirmed all constructs were from rat.
"Valtorta Flavia <valtorta.flavia@hsr.it>
   |
Today, 11:02
Kramarz, Barbara 
Sera Barbara,
both VAMP2 and Syt1 were from rat. Sorry for not specifying this in the paper and thank you for your useful work.
Kind regards,

Flavia"
